what_was_done: Researched skill system usage: v1 MCP (9 uses, dead since Mar 13), v2 MCP (zero executions), slash commands (618 uses). Compared with disler/the-library. Planned consolidation: move /skills/ into /skill-library/, route all invocation through skills-v2 MCP, one CLAUDE.md line replaces 21 system prompt descriptions. Checkpoint commit aa35390.
